items.caption: A movie poster for the film "child's play" from orion pictures. the poster features a yellow cardboard box with a black, blank face on the front, set against a dark, industrial background with shelves of boxes in the background. the text on the poster reads "more than a toy... he's your best friend." below this, it states "from the producers of 'it'." the title "child's play" is prominently displayed at the bottom, with the release date "in theaters june 21, 2019" beneath it. the overall style of the poster is dark and moody, with a focus on the box as the central figure.
